title: Chroma World Border
body:
# Chroma World Border

Makes your world border RGB.

You can use [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the mod's settings where you can enable/disable the chroma effect and change the speed of the world border.

![Chroma World Border](https://github.com/uniformization/chromaworldborder/assets/124226059/ef1cb208-1cf7-4a0c-84c0-eeb4dd900f21)
